text:
Once upon a time in a little village nestled in the heart of the forest, there was a house so enchanting it was whispered about across miles. No one knew exactly who built it, but they knew it was a home where magic flowed just like the brooks. Every autumn, the leaves danced around its windows, singing songs that rustled through the trees.

There lived an old woman named Martha. Martha was known for her vast garden and her mysterious pets—the talking parrots that would chatter about the stars while collecting seeds. One day, while tending her plants, she noticed something strange: an odd-looking bird perched on a branch. Its feathers were unlike anything Martha had ever seen. Intrigued, she leaned closer.

"You there!" she called.

The bird turned its big, wise eye toward her. "Hello!" it chirped. Martha laughed. "That's an unusual one?"

"No!" It hunched down. "It's wise."

Over time, they became buddies
